scripts.smoke:testnet:signer-preflight: node --input-type=module -e "import { createServer } from 'vite'; import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'; const server = await createServer({ root: process.cwd(), server: { middlewareMode: true }, resolve: { alias: { '@': fileURLToPath(new URL('./src', import.meta.url)) } } }); try { const mod = await server.ssrLoadModule('/src/lib/stellar/server/smoke/operator-env.ts'); const reader = (name) => name === 'SETTLEWAY_SMOKE_COMMAND' ? 'signer_preflight' : process.env[name]; const loaded = mod.loadTestnetSmokeOperatorInput(reader); const result = loaded.ok ? await mod.runTestnetSmokeOperator(loaded.input) : { ok: false, command: null, errors: loaded.errors, summary: null }; const output = mod.buildOperatorJsonOutput(result); process.stdout.write(output.json + '\n'); if (!output.ok || !result.ok) { process.exitCode = 1; } } finally { await server.close(); }"
